raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fact","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"According to a report by UNESCO, around 60% of Venice's historic buildings are at risk of damage from rising sea levels and flooding.","distilled_fact":"According to a report by UNESCO, around 60% of Venice's historic buildings are at risk of damage from rising sea levels and flooding."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fact","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"This includes well-known landmarks such as St. Mark's Basilica, which has suffered significant damage over the years due to repeated flooding.","distilled_fact":"St. Mark's Basilica has suffered significant damage over the years due to repeated flooding."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fact","confidence":0.83,"matched_text":"The report estimates that Venice loses around 3-4 million euros worth of cultural heritage assets each year.","distilled_fact":"Venice loses around 3-4 million euros worth of cultural heritage assets each year, according to the report."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fact","confidence":0.72,"matched_text":"This number is expected to rise as sea levels continue to rise and the frequency of flooding increases.","distilled_fact":"The report expects Venice's annual loss of cultural heritage assets to rise as sea levels continue to rise and the frequency of flooding increases."}]}
